subcodes.first_line: Regarding thy question about consultation of a father with his son, or a son with his father, in matters of trade and commerce, consultation is one of the fundamental elements of the foundation of the Law of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی در خصوص مشورت پدر با پسر و پسر با پدر در کسب و تجارت استفسار
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @consultation, @business; financial; property matters, @prayer for forgiveness, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @prayer for detachment, @prayer for healing
